name: Private Fairway Medina
about: Private Fairway Medina offers 24-hour indoor golf access using TrackMan technology at a private studio location. The venue operates on a membership-only basis, with tiered options including unlimited monthly and session-based punch passes. Members benefit from key fob access, a mobile booking app, and detailed swing data analysis to improve their game. The facility limits membership to 35 members per location to ensure ample booking availability.
why_golfers_like_it: TrackMan technology provides detailed swing data

food_and_drink.notes: Members can bring food and drinks for entertaining
Members can bring alcohol for entertaining

simulator_hardware.notes: Premium radar-based launch monitor capturing complete club and ball data

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, you need to bring your own clubs to use the TrackMan simulator system.

faq.question: Can I bring food and drink?
faq.answer: Yes, members can bring food and drinks for entertaining purposes.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Each session lasts 50 minutes, and you can book up to three consecutive sessions (2 hours 50 minutes total).

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: No, this is an adult-focused private membership facility with no specific children's amenities mentioned.
